Patch Set 38:

> Seems we need to define a precedence for net vs. peer preference. If a gateway A is preferred for a peer, but gateway B is preferred for a net, which one wins out?

Did we ever answer this question?

Patch Set 38:

(1 comment)

>>Seems we need to define a precedence for net vs. peer preference. If a gateway A is preferred for a peer, but gateway B is preferred for a net, which one wins out?
>Did we ever answer this question?
If route priority is the same, "preferred for a peer" is going to win the tie. If there's no functional problems with this, I'll update the documentation.

landed via https://review.whamcloud.com/34353

commit.subject: LU-9121 lnet: Preferred gateway selection 2
commit.message:
LU-9121 lnet: Preferred gateway selection 2

Refine the selection of the gateway to take into consideration
the preferred list assigned by the src->rte UDSP which adds
gateway nids on the preferred list for a local ni.
If there are multiple preferred gateways defined, then given
the same route priority, gateway from a local net preferred
list is selected. Otherwise usual selection criteria are
applied.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=lnet-selftest,sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Amir Shehata <ashehata@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: If4f5ebc10c7c9866509d904c727503c25296de12
